features.sample_action: submit essential advisory context with name, email, purpose, and summary

show fields and workflow for support, advisory, media, or collaboration
preserve original submission, consent, source, and lifecycle
create a private case from a consented support handoff

check type, size, filename, integrity, malware workflow, and access

send receipt and internal routing notices
let a requester view limited status and provide updates
issue a new time-limited portal link

features.sample_action: track availability, invitations, changes, and responses
draft and revise a retrofit research proposal
define scope, deliverables, timing, responsibilities, and terms
